patterns_discovered.naming_convention: Descriptive file names with clear purpose (entities, datasources, repositories, etc.)
patterns_discovered.export_structure: Each file acts as an export module for its respective domain

gotchas_discovered.implementation_status: All files are currently empty skeleton files with only comments
gotchas_discovered.missing_real_content: No actual business logic, data models, or implementation details provided
gotchas_discovered.potential_dependency_issues: No import statements or dependencies defined in the skeleton files
gotchas_discovered.interface_implementation_gap: Domain and data repositories both exist but no connection between them
gotchas_discovered.model_entity_relationship: Entities and models files created but no concrete data structures defined

approach_outcome.success_criteria: Successfully created the directory structure following clean architecture principles
approach_outcome.scalability: Structure supports feature growth and maintenance
approach_outcome.organization: Clear separation of concerns across layers
approach_outcome.modularity: Each component can be developed independently
approach_outcome.consistency: Follows established patterns in the codebase

immediate_next_steps: Define concrete data models in offline_models.dart
Implement repository interfaces in domain layer
Create repository implementations in data layer
architecture_consistency: Ensure all layers follow the same naming conventions
Add proper import statements between layers
testing_strategy: Create unit tests for domain entities and services
Add integration tests for data repositories
Implement widget tests for presentation components
documentation: Add detailed comments explaining the offline sync strategy
Document the data flow between layers
Create README for the offline feature
